texto: Civility must be a natural thing
autor: all the rest is considered etiquette. The path of moksha [ultimate liberation] means there must be simplicity. There should be no ‘ghosts of etiquette’ there.
explicacao: Orientação direta de all the rest is considered etiquette. The path of moksha [ultimate liberation] means there must be simplicity. There should be no ‘ghosts of etiquette’ there. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. A afirmação “Civility must be a natural thing” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, dada-bhagwan, civility, útil em momentos de reflexao.
